overall.description: First-person exploration of a narrow cyberpunk corridor featuring vending machines with holographic ads and a wall-mounted news display. The player approaches a green beaded curtain after examining a digital information screen. Game engine footage with neon lighting and industrial metal architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with vending machines and metal walls

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the industrial corridor, approaching the vending machines and wall displays

entered.detail: shimmering green metallic bead curtain dividing the corridor space
futuristic white vending machine with glowing blue interface
colorful holographic poster for Squirtacaster featuring a woman with purple hair
tall industrial metal rack with multiple compartments against the back wall
large digital screen showing news feeds and data graphs with cyan interface
rectangular illuminated panels emitting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through a narrow industrial corridor with corrugated metal walls. A green beaded curtain hangs on the right while futuristic vending machines with holographic advertisements line the left wall. The corridor is lit by warm ceiling panels and cyan digital displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: information terminal area with beaded curtain exit

events.description: camera stops walking and focuses on the wall-mounted news display to read the information
camera turns away from the display and begins moving toward the green beaded curtain

agents.ego_description: stopped to examine the digital news display, then turned and approached the beaded curtain

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on the wall-mounted display showing news articles and graphs with a cyan interface. After examining the screen, the camera turns toward the green beaded curtain, which shimmers with metallic discs as the camera approaches it, filling the frame with its textured surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a narrow industrial corridor that culminates in a close-up encounter with a shimmering curtain. It begins by gliding past corrugated metal walls, where warm ceiling panels contrast with the cyan glow of holographic advertisements on futuristic vending machines. As the camera advances, the focus shifts toward a wall-mounted digital display featuring news articles and graphs in a cyan interface. The scene then turns away from the screen to approach a green beaded curtain, which begins to shimmer with metallic discs. Finally, the camera moves directly into the curtain, allowing its textured surface to fill the entire frame.
